text: Stepping into this space, I feel a quiet sense of curiosity. The glass walls and modern design evoke a mood of possibility, reminding me how transparent boundaries can separate yet invite. Entering the exhibit, the R+D wall suggests a dedication to exploring and understanding, asking how we connect with our world and with emerging technologies. The atmosphere feels alive with questions, pushing me to consider my role as both an observer and participant in the evolving dialogue between humanity and innovation. I am thoughtful, a little humbled, and eager to reflect on the coexistence of routine and invention.
